import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ n: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    let v = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and v >= n
      result = list.push(result, n)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, n)
  end
  result
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut ti = 0
while ti < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(ti)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, n)
  when None
    ()
  end
  ti = ti + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut oi = 0
while oi < sorted.len()
  let v = match sorted.get(oi)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if oi == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  oi = oi + 1
end

println(out)
